$comment: sreality.cz property-search filters -> API parameters. Generated and verified live against https://www.sreality.cz/api/v1 on 2026-06-17.

search.note: Pass any combination of the filter api_params below as query-string. Returns {pagination:{total,limit,offset}, results:[...]}.

codebooks.note: Returns available filters + enum value lists (id/name) for the given category & type. Source of truth for all enums below.

histogram.note: Price histogram buckets for current filter set.

clusters.note: Map clustering for a bounding box.

locality_suggest.note: Autocomplete; each result.userData has entityType + id used for locality_entity_type / locality_entity_id.

api.auth: None for the endpoints above. (Note: /api/v1/estates without /search is a separate authenticated endpoint and returns 401.)

values.label_cs: Jižní Georgie a Jižní Sandwichovy ostrovy
Svatá Helena, Ascension a Tristan da Cunha
